description: Catalogo versionado de padroes conhecidos de falha operacional do ReqSys.

patterns.name: GitHub integration permission denied
match_any: HttpError: Resource not accessible by integration
patterns.recommended_action: Validar permissions do workflow, escopo do GITHUB_TOKEN e uso de pull_request_target apenas quando houver justificativa e guardrails.

patterns.name: Pull request merge conflict
match_any: This branch has conflicts that must be resolved
patterns.recommended_action: Atualizar a branch com a base main, resolver conflitos localmente e reexecutar PR Conflict Guard antes de liberar merge.

patterns.name: GitHub or provider quota exhausted
patterns.recommended_action: Aplicar backoff, reduzir chamadas redundantes e evitar rerun em loop. Reexecutar somente após janela operacional segura.

patterns.name: Missing or unavailable artifact
patterns.recommended_action: Validar etapa de upload, nome do artifact, retention-days e permissao de leitura do workflow.

patterns.name: Workflow timeout or cancellation
patterns.recommended_action: Classificar se foi instabilidade ou teste lento. Permitir rerun governado apenas se nao houver alteracao de codigo necessaria.

patterns.name: Node dependency installation failure
match_any: ERESOLVE unable to resolve dependency tree
patterns.recommended_action: Validar lockfile, versao Node, cache e compatibilidade de dependencias antes de reexecutar.

patterns.name: Python lint or formatting failure
patterns.recommended_action: Corrigir lint/formatacao no codigo-fonte e manter falha como bloqueio legitimo, sem rerun como solucao.

patterns.name: Automated test failure
patterns.recommended_action: Tratar como regressao ate prova contraria. Inspecionar teste, alterar codigo ou teste somente com evidencia.
